# Kastriot Tanaj — SEO & AI Automation Consultant New York

> New York SEO consultant and AI automation expert helping NYC businesses rank #1 on Google and automate growth. AI-powered SEO strategies, business automation workflows, and proven results across Europe and the USA.

## Pages

- [Home](https://kastriottanaj.com/): SEO & AI Automation Consultant New York — AI-Powered Strategies for NYC Businesses
- [Services](https://kastriottanaj.com/services): SEO Strategy & Consulting, AI-Powered Content Systems, AI Automation Workflows for Businesses, 1-on-1 SEO Coaching
- [About](https://kastriottanaj.com/about): 4+ years experience, 100+ clients, proven page 1 rankings across Europe, now serving NYC
- [Blog](https://kastriottanaj.com/blog): SEO tips, AI automation insights, and digital marketing strategies
- [Portfolio](https://kastriottanaj.com/portfolio): SEO case studies with proven results — STS Company, Faralda Crane Hotel, AT BAU GmbH, and more
- [Contact](https://kastriottanaj.com/contact): Free SEO consultation — book a call, WhatsApp, or email
